params.name: Kola Drilling Rig
params.description:
On Jan 12, 1970 AD, the Kola Drilling Rig was made, and it played a vital role in the exploration that began four months later.
The Kola Drilling Rig was used on the Kola Peninsula. The drilling took twenty-four years and a lot of manpower and resources. Due to the extremely high temperatures of the deep underground rocks, the drilling rig required constant cooling and frequent bit replacements. The drilling eventually reached over 12000 meters in depth, making it the world's deepest man-made …
